description: Counts registered passenger cars that are red, electric, and above a kW threshold. Use for red electric high-power count questions.

configuration.query: FROM dmr-raw-000002 | WHERE KoeretoejRegistreringStatus.keyword == "Registreret" AND KoeretoejArtNavn.keyword == "Personbil" AND KoeretoejOplysningGrundStruktur.KoeretoejFarveStruktur.FarveTypeStruktur.FarveTypeNavn.keyword == "Rød" AND _drivkraft_primaer == "El" | EVAL power_kw = KoeretoejOplysningGrundStruktur.KoeretoejMotorStruktur.KoeretoejMotorStoersteEffekt | WHERE power_kw > ?min_power_kw AND power_kw <= 750 | STATS car_count = COUNT(*), avg_power_kw = AVG(power_kw), max_power_kw = MAX(power_kw) | LIMIT 1

min_power_kw.description: Minimum motor power in kW, e.g. 300.
